hero.title: Project Management & Principal Designer Support
hero.subtitle: End-to-end project delivery with CDM 2015 coordination built in.
hero.description: From new premises to the refurbishment of existing sites, we run your construction projects from inception to completion — and act as Principal Designer, or advise your appointed PD, on pre-construction health & safety. Practical coordination, proportionate documentation, defensible decisions.

overview.heading: Projects Delivered, CDM Discharged
overview.description: Every project is different, and every CDM appointment carries real legal weight. We pair hands-on project management with specialist knowledge of the Construction (Design and Management) Regulations 2015 — so you get a delivery partner who understands both the programme and the paperwork.

features.title: Principal Designer (CDM 2015)
features.description: Taking the Principal Designer role on your project — planning, managing, monitoring and coordinating health & safety through the pre-construction phase, and coordinating the design team to design out risk.

features.title: Principal Designer Support
features.description: Where another party is formally appointed as PD, we provide specialist H&S input, pre-construction information, design risk workshops and competence assurance — filling the capability gap without taking the legal role.

features.title: Pre-Construction Information
features.description: Production and issue of proportionate, genuinely useful PCI packs — so tenderers price the job correctly and the Principal Contractor inherits a clean baseline for the construction phase plan.

features.title: Project Management
features.description: Full PM service from inception to handover for fit-outs, refurbishments and new premises — scope, budget, programme, stakeholder management and quality, with a single accountable point of contact.

features.title: Procurement & Tender Support
features.description: Writing specifications, running tenders, evaluating contractors on competence as well as cost, and drafting the right form of contract for the risk profile of the job.

features.title: Health & Safety File
features.description: Collating, structuring and handing over a Health & Safety File your future duty holder — and the next project team — will actually be able to use.

steps.title: Brief & Scope
steps.description: We start with a thorough understanding of your project — the business reason, the programme drivers, the site constraints, and where the real risks sit for the client under CDM.

steps.title: Coordinate & Control
steps.description: Through pre-construction we coordinate the design team to eliminate or reduce risk, issue the PCI, assure competence of appointees, and keep design decisions, programme and budget aligned.

steps.title: Deliver & Hand Over
steps.description: Into construction we monitor change against the PD role, support the Principal Contractor, and close the project out with a Health & Safety File and commissioning evidence that stand up to scrutiny.

cta.heading: Start Your Project Right
cta.description: Whether you need a Principal Designer appointed, end-to-end project management, or specialist CDM support for your in-house team, we'll scope the right level of involvement for your project.
